title: Line-Based Log Parser
description: Implement a line-based parser for structured log files with timestamp, level, and message extraction.
requirements: LogEntry dataclass with timestamp, level, message fields
Support log levels: DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL
Handle malformed lines gracefully (skip or report)

few_shot_examples.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import datetime
from enum import Enum

class LogLevel(Enum):
    DEBUG = 'DEBUG'
    INFO = 'INFO'
    WARN = 'WARN'
    ERROR = 'ERROR'
    FATAL = 'FATAL'

@dataclass
class LogEntry:
    timestamp: datetime
    level: LogLevel
    message: str
